name: real_video_session
description: E63 scenario ALIGNED to the real 5-minute test video the user will film. Each event's t (seconds) matches the video's shot breakdown so the scripted ASR finals / intents land while the matching content is on screen. Use with: run_harness.py --media <that_video.mp4> --scenario real_video_session.json --duration 305 --with-close-day. NOTE: wake word and gestures are device-side and NOT testable by this harness (reserved for the real OnePlus session); the '« viki aide-moi »' line is delivered here as a help_start device_transcript at t=240, standing in for the on-device wake-word path.

video_breakdown.0:00-1:30: conversation with a visible person (memorable facts: 'demain je dois racheter des piles', 'rendez-vous avec Karim jeudi 15h chez le dentiste', a promise) -> diarisation, memory, entities, Life Model, PersonTag
video_breakdown.1:30-2:30: table of objects (phone, keys, bottle, book, cup), slow pan 3-4s/object, then put the keys down and move them out of frame -> detection, what_is, where_is (last seen)
video_breakdown.2:30-3:00: text in stable close-up 5s -> OCR, read the text, translate it
video_breakdown.3:00-4:00: walk through 2-3 rooms, return to the first with an object moved -> tracking, scene change, ChangeAttention
video_breakdown.4:00-5:00: manual activity in first-person (e.g. making a coffee); at ~4:00 the user says 'viki aide-moi' -> help_start final ASR + VLM glance

events.text: retiens demain je dois racheter des piles
retiens rendez-vous avec Karim jeudi 15h chez le dentiste
qu'est-ce qui a change dans la piece
interroge ma memoire qui est Karim
